task_description:
# Robust Error Handling & Recovery

Implement comprehensive error handling and automatic recovery mechanisms

## Rationale
System reliability is critical for teams depending on AI-assisted development workflows

## User Stories
- As a user, I want the system to automatically recover from errors so that my work isn't lost
- As a developer, I want clear error messages so that I can quickly resolve issues

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All API calls have retry logic with exponential backoff
- [ ] Failed agent executions can be recovered
- [ ] System gracefully handles Claude API limits
- [ ] Users receive clear error messages and recovery options
